citation: VA M26-7 Topic 7 — Northeast region, family of 2, loan < $80k
comment: Hand-calc: Northeast family-2, loan $75,000 (BELOW 80k threshold) → uses table_below_80k['northeast']['2'] = $654. Actual $700 >= $654 → pass. binding_rule_citation = 'VA-RESIDUAL-NORTHEAST-FAMILY-2'. Boundary test: must NOT use table_above_80k.
